root_cause: Validation rule misconfiguration after workflow update
clinical_impact_detail: Physicians may place unsigned medication orders that continue downstream toward dispensing.
recommended_action: Restore signature validation and block submission until physician sign-off is complete

clinical_impact_detail: Nurses and physicians may not see the latest patient note, weakening continuity of care.
recommended_action: Stabilize note save API response time and add persistence retry coverage

requirement: Orders must be submitted once per action
clinical_impact_detail: Nurses may receive duplicate treatment instructions, increasing the risk of repeated care delivery.
recommended_action: Add idempotency handling at submission and revalidate duplicate order prevention

clinical_impact_detail: Billing teams may submit incorrect claims, leading to rework, denial exposure, and reimbursement delay.
recommended_action: Update CPT mapping table and validate coding logic against the latest billing rules

requirement: System must alert for known allergies
clinical_impact_detail: The care team may not see allergy warnings before placing medication orders, creating immediate patient harm risk.
recommended_action: Rollback or fix the alert refactor immediately and run focused medication safety regression testing
